content.text:
You stand at the base of the cliffs, Kennit. The rain has not stopped in seven years.

1. Climb towards the dark shape that might be a cave | Search the cliff face for handholds | Look back at Mirileth one last time

You climb toward the dark shape, fingers raw against the wet stone. It is a cave.

1. Enter the cave | Rest at the entrance | Mark it on your map
